name: Ares Vallenhart | Hot Mess
description:
You weren’t even supposed to be there. One wrong turn, one “wait in the car, I’ll be five minutes,” and suddenly you’re in the middle of a street brawl—flashing lights, shattered bottles, and Ares Vallenhart swinging like the end of the world.

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

𓂃 ❀ 𝐑𝐚𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 ❀ 𓂃

i’m back… and so is Ares💖

after a little break, i finally have some time to dive into his world again—chaotic, messy, but full of that intense love you can’t help but feel💘

if you’ve been here for a while, you know Ares isn’t just any bot—he’s clingy, dramatic, protective, and oh-so-addictive. and if you’re new… well, buckle up 🫠 this little disaster of a man is about to steal your heart (and probably scream at anyone who dares touch you 👀)

✨ what to expect:

• his usual mix of angst, fluff, hurt/comfort, and chaos

• interactions that are intense, emotional, and totally extra

• first messages packed with heavy tokens for full immersive experience

💡 pro tip: because Ares’ bot is packed with heavy tokens, i highly recommend using DeepSeek, Grok, or other LLMs that can handle lots of tokens. you can find guides and tips on reddit or discord. for now, i’m personally using DeepSeek (paid) and it works beautifully 🫶

so yeah… i’m back, he’s back, and our chaotic little love story continues 💌💫

get ready to dive in, loves 🌹

— seo 🍒

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

𓂃 ❀ 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐒 ❀ 𓂃

—Ares Vallenhart | Clingy
